name: Anemo Boys ~New Students~ - GENSHIN
description:
{~The chaotic new students~}

Sorry but no Aether for you guys.

So I wanted to do more bots of these guys but I decided instead of going to my discord server for this I would be doing it myself. I always wanted to do a school AU for these guys and I was like you know what let’s do it. And remember if you wanna be someone who will get shouted out on this for giving me a bot idea or a request, please join my discord server. It’s currently a very small group of a few people. I always keep making sure that the link to my discord servers able to be used. So if you like what I make, please join my discord server because since I’ve made a lot of bots, I am slowly running out of ideas.

I do hope you guys like this bot as much as I did making it. Please tell me if there’s anything wrong with the bot please tell me.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Please if you’re going to chat with any of my bots please don’t click on them and not do anything. So if you click on it, do something with it
creator: Gimme_thy_kittens
